questions: What is the full form of HTML?
What is the difference between semantic and non-semantic HTML?
Why css is required for building a website?
What is the difference between flexbox and grid?
Difference between supervised and unsupervised learning?
answers:
Semantic describes meaning of the content. eg <header>, <article>
Non semantic dont describe meaning of the content. eg <div>, <span>
flexbox works in one direction. grid works in two directions
supervised feeds on labelled dataset. unsupervised feeds on unlabelled dataset
